point1.footer: The processing of personal data takes place on the basis of co-administration (art. 26 RODO)

point2.point1: conducting sports activities, in particular boxing, kickboxing, taekwondo, fight cross training,

point3.content: Art. 6 ust. 1 lit b) RODO – performance of a contract to which the data subject is a party.

point4.header: Personal data is not transferred to recipients
point4.content: The data will be stored for the duration of the contract and after its termination for the time necessary to secure the pursuit of claims.

point5.header: The data subject has the right
point5.point3: deletion or restriction of data processing,
point5.point5: lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority
point5.footer: Providing personal data is voluntary, however, it determines participation in sports activities conducted by IRS and Wargalsport.

description.p1: I started with Taekwondo training in 1993 in one of Krakow's housing estates. As a competitor, I won medals of national competitions in Taekwondo and Kickboxing. I have a 3rd dan Taekwondo and 1st dan Kickboxing. I am a certified instructor of the following disciplines: Taekwondo, Kickboxing, Fitness - strength exercises and the qualifications of a trainer of the discipline: Boxing.
description.p2: I am the president and main trainer at the IRS club. I take part in the preparation of competitors taking part in Boxing, Kickboxing and Taekwondo. My pupils won medals at the Polish Championships, the European Championships, and the World Championships. I am a graduate of Collegium Medicum of the Jagiellonian University in the field of Medical Emergency.
description.p3: During my studies, I also trained Judo in the CMUJ sports section. I organized sports camps and training camps.

description.p1: I began my martial arts journey with kickboxing and later moved into boxing, which became my main discipline. Over the years of competing, I gained experience both nationally and internationally.
description.p2: I am a five-time medalist of the Polish Championships in boxing and kickboxing, a Boxing World Cup vice champion, and a multi-medalist of international boxing tournaments. For many years I was a member of the national team, which gave me a solid athletic and coaching foundation.
description.p3: Today I use that experience in coaching. At IRS I lead classes based on proven training methods, focusing on technique, footwork, motor preparation, and safety. I adapt each training session to the level and goals of the participants, whether they are children, beginners, or competitors.
description.p4: I see boxing not only as a competitive sport, but also as a tool for building character, confidence, and physical fitness. I try to pass these values on to everyone who trains with me at IRS.

description.p1: I have trained boxing for 8 years and have been leading classes for 3 years. I am characterized by attention to technical detail and an individual approach to every participant. I draw my coaching knowledge not only from practice and observing other coaches, but also from studying hundreds of hours of training and fight footage from athletes around the world. Privately, I work on city digitization, and in my free time I ride a motorcycle and dance swing.

I started my martial arts journey at the age of 13. Since then, I have continuously developed my skills. As a competitor, I won medals many times at sports competitions. I hold a 1st dan in Taekwondo and a 1st kyu in Kickboxing. Along the way, I discovered the broad and diverse world of martial arts and combat sports. Today I focus on passing my knowledge and skills to my students during training and in our conversations.

The IRS was established in 2016. Since then, we have been running boxing and kickboxing trainings for children, teenagers and adults. We are affiliated with the Polish Boxing Association and the Polish Kickboxing Association.
description.p2: Our mission is to promote martial arts among people of all ages and to promote a healthy lifestyle. During training, we teach how to fight an opponent, but most of all, we learn to fight our own weaknesses. We infect with positive energy.
description.p3: Take up your gloves and join our IRS team!

content.1: The club is closed from 16-23 September 2022. Contact by email or messenger only.
